text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I head to the infirmary to pay<n><chrname> a visit to
since she recently<n>got injured... only to see a
familiar<n>figure already standing by her<n>bedside.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Here I go! A little poke, and your<n>injury will be as
good as healed!
choice_data_list: What do you think you're doing?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Treating a patient, duh! This poor<n>Umamusume
needs medical attention!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
And if not an acupuncturist to give her<n>a good
poke, then who?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I've even looked up chakra points<n>that help treat
injuries! You have to<n>give me a chance! Please!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Even though I want to do everything I<n>can for
<chrname>'s benefit, it doesn't<n>feel safe leaving
her in the hands of<n>Sasami Anshinzawa.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I think you might be misunderstanding<n>my
intentions. I'm not treating<n>Umamusume just for
acupuncture's<n>sake.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
It's the other way around! I'm doing<n>
acupuncture for all Umamusume<n>kind's sake!
choice_data_list:
...Can it be? You truly care that much about
Umamusume?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
And I'd be elated if their futures<n>involved more
needles...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Leave the rest to me. Sorry, I can't<n>have people
milling about while I'm<n>providing treatment, so
off you go!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
And while I'm at it, I'll take this<n>opportunity to try
a few things! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Th-thump! Kablam! Zrrrt! Whirrr!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I-it's a miracle! She's in even better<n>shape than
before she got injured...<n>How can this be?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
It sure was nerve-wracking when I<n>poked the
wrong chakra, but wow!<n>I'm a genius! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Just as Sasami proclaimed, <chrname><n>has made
a complete recovery and is<n>now stronger than
ever!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
It was a great success! I guess info<n>on Umatter
can be pretty trustworthy<n>after all...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, by the way, I took the liberty of<n>activating a
few extra chakra that'll<n>boost her strength! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Just as Sasami proclaimed, <chrname><n>has
recovered from her injury and<n>grown stronger!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Something doesn't feel quite<n>right... It's
almost like the treatment's<n>not working or
something...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, everyone has off days!<n>Anyways, I'll be
going! The rest is up<n>to you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She might not have healed from her<n>injuries, but
I'm just glad that<n><chrname> is safe and sound.
